**Expected.** AMD to base and resume higher; risk discipline to keep weekly drawdown shallow.

**Actual.** AMD faded to -5.4% and dragged day P&L negative on Monday. Discipline held elsewhere: the TSLA and SMCI rejections avoided two losing setups.

**Lesson.** Honor the trim trigger earlier on losers approaching the stop rather than hoping for a base; the rejections show the governance filters are doing their job.
